negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_a6beffc6-0c10-45d4-9ac1-06e482f25ebf
prompt: A point-of-view video shot from inside a car, positioned at an intersection in a small town or suburban area. The car's dashboard is visible in the foreground, reflecting the surroundings on its hood. The intersection features a "clear keep" marking painted on the road, indicating traffic regulations for vehicles waiting at the light. Across the street, there is a row of buildings with a uniform architectural style, likely commercial establishments such as shops or restaurants. These buildings have a beige facade with brown roofs and large windows, giving them a classic, possibly mid-20th-century aesthetic. Trees line the sidewalks and streets, adding greenery to the scene. Several cars are parked along the sides of the road, and a few pedestrians can be seen walking near the buildings. The sky is clear and blue, suggesting a sunny day. In the background, hills are visible, adding depth to the landscape.  As the video progresses, the car begins to move forward through the intersection and double yellow line markings are seen on the asphalt. The camera remains stationary, capturing the movement of the vehicle as it navigates the road. The car passes by the buildings on the left, revealing more details of their architecture and signage, and then moves towards the left. A car is parked on the right side of the ego vehicle, and a man is opening its door. The trees remain stationary, and the sky stays clear and blue throughout, maintaining the sunny weather conditions. By the final frame, the car has passed the initial intersection and turned left toward a building. The scene transitions to a quieter street lined with parked cars and more trees. The buildings on the right side of the road appear to be part of a different commercial complex, with a mix of older and newer structures. The overall atmosphere remains calm and quiet, typical of a small-town setting.
